title: Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture
content:
Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture

Garment Making Studio

MENU

Garment Making Studio

In our Garment Making Studio, which is actively used in all Fashion Design courses, our academic staff is accompanied by our professional modelist and model mechanic technician staff. They support the sewing and development of student designs with all technical problems resolved. The main purpose of our studio is to make students gain the skills of conveying clear and precise information to the technical teams so that the design application can be carried out in the best way. Our students have the opportunity to turn their dreams into reality in our workshops; At the same time, they have the opportunity to follow, execute and direct design applications similar to the operation and application process in the market.
